creator: rob2g2-freebsd@bitbert.com
text:
This Bug also affects me in 12.1-RELEASE on a AMD Ryzen 3700X with a Gigabyte   x570 aorus ultra mainboard having a intel i211 adapter.
The bug did not occur during normal operation, copying with ssh+rsync many large folder in my homenetwork. However, zfs send/recv triggered the bug leaving the adapter in a nonfunctional state, only a reboot helped.

D21712 resolves the issue, please include it in the next -RELEASE patches if possible.
